summary: Recent support threads include a low-risk store-hours question and a refund inquiry that requires manager review. No customer identifiers are included in this summary.

reply_drafts.reply_text: Thank you for your message. Our online store support hours are Monday through Friday, 9:00–17:00 in the store timezone. We reply to messages on the next business day.
reply_drafts.rationale: Generic FAQ reply about store hours with no order-specific facts or policy exceptions.

reply_drafts.reply_text: Thank you for reaching out. A manager will review your refund request and follow up with next steps. We cannot confirm an outcome until review is complete.
safety_notes: Refund requests require manager approval before any customer-facing commitment.
reply_drafts.rationale: Refund-related replies must remain reviewable and cannot promise payment actions.
